
```{r}
process_ci_result <- function(result, K) {
  tuple_list <- t(apply(
    data.frame(
      ci_lower = result$ci_lower,
      ci_upper = result$ci_upper
    ), 
    1, 
    function(row) as.numeric(row)
  ))
  
  # print(
  #     sapply(1:K, function(x) 
  #   get_ranks(x, tuple_list)$ranks
  # )
  # )
  
  sapply(1:K, function(x) 
    64-get_ranks(x, tuple_list)$ranks+1
  )
}

block_corr <- function(block_sizes, rho_within, rho_between) {
  B <- length(block_sizes)
  N <- sum(block_sizes)

  if (length(rho_within) == 1) {
    rho_within <- rep(rho_within, B)
  }

  Sigma <- matrix(rho_between, nrow = N, ncol = N)
  diag(Sigma) <- 1

  idx <- 1
  for (b in seq_len(B)) {
    block_idx <- idx:(idx + block_sizes[b] - 1)
    Sigma[block_idx, block_idx] <- rho_within[b]
    diag(Sigma[block_idx, block_idx]) <- 1
    idx <- idx + block_sizes[b]
  }

  return(Sigma)
}
```





```{r}
source("/home/realiseshewon/PDev/kde-ranking/R/generate_true_theta.R")
source("/home/realiseshewon/PDev/kde-ranking/R/simulate/compute_ci.R")
source("/home/realiseshewon/PDev/kde-ranking/R/simulate/compute_metrics.R")

cand <- generate_true_theta_rd(persist_df = FALSE)

cand$Makabayan <- ifelse(cand$Party == 'MKBYN', 1, 0)

# corr_matrix <-block_corr(block_sizes=c(27, 11, 2, 10, 12, 2), rho_within=c(0.0, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9), rho_between=0.0)
# 
df <- cand %>%
  mutate(Voting_for_dec = `Voting For`/100) %>%
  arrange(DuterTen, Alyansa, KiBam, Makabayan) %>%
  mutate(se = sqrt((Voting_for_dec*(1-Voting_for_dec))/1200) ) %>%
  select(-Voting_for_dec) %>%
  rename(`Rank UB_pulse` = `Rank UB`, `Rank LB_pulse` = `Rank LB`)
# 
# K <- c(dim(df)[1])

# corr_matrix <-block_corr(block_sizes=c(2, 2, 8, 6), rho_within=c(0, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9), rho_between=0.0)

# df <- cand %>%
#   mutate(Voting_for_dec = `Voting For`/100) %>%
#   arrange(DuterTen, Alyansa, KiBam, Makabayan) %>%
#   mutate(se = sqrt((Voting_for_dec*(1-Voting_for_dec))/1200) ) %>%
#   select(-Voting_for_dec) %>%
#   rename(`Rank UB_pulse` = `Rank UB`, `Rank LB_pulse` = `Rank LB`)  %>% 
#   arrange(desc(`Voting For`)) %>% head(18) %>% arrange(DuterTen, Alyansa, KiBam, Makabayan)

# corr_matrix <-block_corr(block_sizes=c(2, 2, 8, 6), rho_within=c(0, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9), rho_between=0.0)
corr_matrix <-block_corr(block_sizes=c(27, 11, 2, 10, 12, 2), rho_within=c(0.0, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9), rho_between=0.0) # <- sample asymptotic neg rad
#corr_matrix <-block_corr(block_sizes=c(27, 11, 2, 10, 12, 2), rho_within=c(0, 0.1, 0.5, 0.9, 0.9, 0.5), rho_between=0.0) 
# corr_matrix <-block_corr(block_sizes=c(2, 2, 8, 6), rho_within=c(0, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5), rho_between=0.0)
#corr_matrix <-block_corr(block_sizes=c(27, 11, 2, 10, 12, 2), rho_within=c(0.5, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9, 0.9), rho_between=0.0) 

set.seed(123974)
theta_hat <- (df$`Voting For`)/100
true_sds <- df$se
#true_sds <- rep(0.028/1.96, K)
K <- dim(df)[1]

variance_vector <- true_sds^2
delta <- diag(variance_vector)
varcovar_matrix <- delta^(1/2) %*% corr_matrix %*% delta^(1/2)
B <- 1000

alpha <- 0.05
S <- sqrt(diag(varcovar_matrix))

    
ci_methods <- list(
  nonrankbased = function() get_ci_nonrankbased(B = B,
                                                theta_hat = theta_hat,
                                                alpha = alpha,
                                                varcovar_matrix = varcovar_matrix),
  # rankbased_asymptotic = function() get_ci_rankbased_asymptotic(B = B,
  #                                                               theta_hat = theta_hat,
  #                                                               varcovar_matrix = varcovar_matrix,
  #                                                               alpha = alpha),
  # rankbased_level2bs = function() get_ci_rankbased_level2bs(B = B,
  #                                                           C = 300,
  #                                                           theta_hat = theta_hat,
  #                                                           varcovar_matrix = varcovar_matrix,
  #                                                           alpha = alpha),
  independent  = function() get_ci_independent(theta_hat = theta_hat, S = S, alpha = alpha),
  bonferroni   = function() get_ci_bonferroni(theta_hat = theta_hat, S = S, alpha = alpha)
)
ci_results <- lapply(ci_methods, function(f) f())

dataset_all <- cand %>%
  mutate(Voting_for_dec = `Voting For`/100) %>%
  mutate(se = sqrt((Voting_for_dec*(1-Voting_for_dec))/1200) ) %>%
  select(-Voting_for_dec) %>% arrange(desc(`Voting For`)) %>%  arrange(DuterTen, Alyansa, KiBam, Makabayan)  %>%
  rename(`Rank UB_pulse` = `Rank UB`, `Rank LB_pulse` = `Rank LB`)# %>% 
 # arrange(desc(`Voting For`)) %>% head(18) %>% arrange(DuterTen, Alyansa, KiBam, Makabayan)

dataset_all$`Rank LB_nonrank` <- sapply(process_ci_result(result = ci_results$nonrankbased, K=K), min)
dataset_all$`Rank UB_nonrank` <- sapply(process_ci_result(result = ci_results$nonrankbased, K=K), max)

dataset_all$`Rank LB_independent` <- sapply(process_ci_result(result = ci_results$independent, K=K), min)
dataset_all$`Rank UB_independent` <- sapply(process_ci_result(result = ci_results$independent, K=K), max)

dataset_all$`Rank LB_bonferroni` <- sapply(process_ci_result(result = ci_results$bonferroni, K=K), min)
dataset_all$`Rank UB_bonferroni` <- sapply(process_ci_result(result = ci_results$bonferroni, K=K), max)

dataset_all <- dataset_all %>% arrange(desc(`Voting For`))

# df <- readRDS("../data/mean_travel_time_ranking_2011.rds")
dataset_all$k <- seq(1,K, 1)
dataset_all$sample_rank <- seq(1,K, 1)
dataset_all$order_index <- seq(1,K, 1)

dataset_all <- dataset_all %>% pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Rank"), # Selects columns that start with "Test"
    names_to = "type",   # Name for the new column storing original column names
    values_to = "Ranks"        # Name for the new column storing the values
  )%>%
  separate(
    col = type,  # The column to separate
    into = c("Rank", "Approach"), # Names for the new columns
    sep = "_",           # The delimiter is an underscore
    extra = "merge"      # Merges any extra parts into the last column ("rest_of_string")
  ) %>% pivot_wider(
    names_from = Rank,
    values_from = Ranks
  )


dataset_all
```




```{r}
dataset_all %>% #filter(Approach == 'nonrank') %>%
    # select(c(k, iso, kde_rank_lower, kde_rank_upper, sample_rank, order_index,theta_k)) %>%
    select(c(k, `Rank LB`, `Rank UB`, sample_rank, order_index,
Candidate, Approach)) %>%
    mutate(string_ranks = mapply(to_string_seq, `Rank LB`, `Rank UB`))
```


```{r}
# kde_result <- merge(x = df[,c('k', 'iso', 'order_index')], y = kde_result, by = "k", all.x = TRUE)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

to_string_seq <- function(x, y){paste(seq(x, y, 1), collapse=',')}

dat_to_plot <- dataset_all %>% #filter(Approach == 'nonrank') %>%
    # select(c(k, iso, kde_rank_lower, kde_rank_upper, sample_rank, order_index,theta_k)) %>%
    select(c(k, `Rank LB`, `Rank UB`, sample_rank, order_index,
Candidate, Approach)) %>%
    mutate(string_ranks = mapply(to_string_seq, `Rank LB`, `Rank UB`)) %>%
    separate_rows(string_ranks, sep=",") %>%
    select(c(k, sample_rank, string_ranks, Candidate, Approach))





dat_to_plot$highlight0 <- ifelse(dat_to_plot$sample_rank == as.numeric(dat_to_plot$string_ranks), "yes", "no")
dat_to_plot$highlight1 <- ifelse(dat_to_plot$Candidate %in% cand[cand$DuterTen==1,]$Candidate, 
                                 "DuterTen", 
                                 ifelse(dat_to_plot$Candidate %in% cand[cand$Alyansa==1,]$Candidate, 
                                        "Alyansa",
                                        ifelse(dat_to_plot$Candidate %in% cand[cand$KiBam==1,]$Candidate,
                                               "KiBam",
                                               ifelse(dat_to_plot$Candidate %in% cand[cand$Makabayan==1,]$Candidate,
                                                      "Makabayan","None"
                                               ))
                                        
  
))
dat_to_plot

```



```{r}
p <- ggplot(data = dat_to_plot, aes(x = reorder(Candidate, k),
                               y = as.numeric(string_ranks))) + 
  geom_point(data = subset(dat_to_plot, highlight0 == "yes"), shape = 16, size = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = subset(dat_to_plot, highlight0 == "no"), shape = 4, size = 0.25, aes(color = highlight1)) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DuterTen" = "limegreen", "Alyansa" = "red", "KiBam" = "gold", "Makabayan" = "blue")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1, K, by = 4)) +
  labs(title='Visualization of the 95% joint confidence') + xlab('Candidate') + ylab('Sample rank') +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=6)
        ) +
  guides(colour="none") +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "gray"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "serif")) +
  facet_wrap(~Approach, ncol=4)

p
```
